title: Junior Business Development Manager at Gera Developments

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Gera Developments
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Gera Developments. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!
